kw.arg: for(var i = 0; i < allButtons.length; i++) { var btn = allButtons[i]; var hasStarClass = btn.className && (btn.className.includes('star') || btn.className.includes('rating') || btn.className.includes('cursor-pointer')); var hasStarAttr = btn.getAttribute('data-star') || btn.getAttribute('data-rating'); var hasStarText = btn.textContent && (btn.textContent.includes('★') || btn.textContent.includes('star')); if(hasStarClass || hasStarAttr || hasStarText) { starButtons.push(btn); } }
if(starButtons.length >= 1) { starButtons[0].click(); starButtons[0].dispatchEvent(new Event('click', { bubbles: true })); }

kw.arg: for(var i = 0; i < allButtons.length; i++) { var btn = allButtons[i]; var hasStarClass = btn.className && (btn.className.includes('star') || btn.className.includes('rating') || btn.className.includes('cursor-pointer')); var hasStarAttr = btn.getAttribute('data-star') || btn.getAttribute('data-rating'); var hasStarText = btn.textContent && (btn.textContent.includes('★') || btn.textContent.includes('star')); if(hasStarClass || hasStarAttr || hasStarText) { starButtons.push(btn); } }
if(starButtons.length >= 5) { starButtons[4].click(); starButtons[4].dispatchEvent(new Event('click', { bubbles: true })); }
